title: Section 62A Planning Application: S62A/2025/0123 13 Risdale Road, Ashton, Bristol, BS3 2QU
body: "Type of application:  Full Planning Application  Applicant name:  G Gilliatt, Noogle Property Ltd  Site address:  13 Risdale Road, Ashton, Bristol, BS3 2QU  Description of proposed development:  Erection of a detached dwellinghouse  Case Officer:  Section 62A Applications Team  Procedure:   Written Representations  Key dates:      Date     Date application valid 25 September 2025   Date by when representations must be made 28 October 2025   Hearing date and venue NA   Target Decision 20 November 2025   Decision date 6 November 2025     Decision   Decision Notice and Statement of Reasons  (PDF, 236 KB, 5 pages)   Make a representation  The application can be inspected under the application plans and documents heading below.  You will be able to comment on this application until 28 October 2025.  Please base your comments on planning matters.  Please avoid the use of inflammatory, discriminatory or abusive comments  All representations made in connection with the development proposal will be made publicly available on the website shortly after the end of the representation period.  The name of the individual author or organisation will be published however addresses, signatures and contact details will not be published.  We advise you not to include any other personal information about yourself or others. Our Customer Privacy Notice sets out how we handle personal data in accordance with the law.  Send your comments via email to  section62anonmajor@planninginspectorate.gov.uk  or write to Section 62A Applications Team, Planning Inspectorate, 3rd Floor, Temple Quay House, 2 The Square, Temple Quay, Bristol, BS1 6PN  Sending comments by email will enable us to deal with them more quickly.  Please include the application reference number S62A/2025/0123 and site address.  This application will be determined by an Inspector appointed by the Secretary of State.  Shortly after the close of the representation period the Planning Inspectorate will consider whether a hearing is necessary.   In the event that a hearing is scheduled, and you would wish to speak at the hearing, you must make this request at the time you submit your written representations.  Where the application is to be considered at a hearing, notice of the date, time and venue for the hearing along with the name of the person holding the hearing, will be published on this website at least one week before the date of the hearing.   Application Plans and Documents     4306.PL.01 SLP  (PDF, 152 KB, 1 page)  4306.PL.02 Existing Proposed Block Plans Rev E  (PDF, 1.25 MB, 1 page)  4306.PL.03 Proposed Plans Elevations Rev B  (PDF, 459 KB, 1 page)  4306.PL.04 Existing Proposed Street Scene Elevations Rev A  (PDF, 320 KB, 1 page)  250910 cover letter PR002526 FINAL  (PDF, 621 KB, 17 pages)  AE515 13 Risdale Road - Bristol - PEA and BNG Assessment V2  (PDF, 2.03 MB, 11 pages)  APPLICATION FORM  (PDF, 1.01 MB, 14 pages)  cil questions  (PDF, 394 KB, 6 pages)  Draft BNG S106 Agreement  (PDF, 274 KB, 10 pages)  EEGSL CMRA Report B4355 13 Risdale Road Bristol  (PDF, 6.16 MB, 26 pages)  Energy Statement  (PDF, 524 KB, 8 pages)  SSM baselineBASELINE  (XLSM, 2.31 MB)  Statutory Biodiversity Metric Condition Assessments23.07.24  (MS Excel Spreadsheet, 384 KB)   Questionnaire and supporting...
